metadata.title: Automotive Sales Follow-up Situations
metadata.description: See how PitchForge supports different customer stages and communication situations.

showcases.title: Every stage needs a different follow-up
showcases.description: From first contact to post-sale service, PitchForge helps sales advisors speak from the customer’s real context.

items.title: New lead · Confirm the need
items.description: Open with purchase timing, driving context, budget, and vehicle interest instead of pushing too early.

items.title: Ongoing follow-up · Continue the story
items.description: Carry forward the priorities and concerns the customer already shared.

items.title: Visit invitation · Make the next step concrete
items.description: Clarify what the customer can experience and offer time choices that are easy to answer.

items.title: Negotiation · Return to fit and value
items.description: Discuss trim, space, ownership cost, and practical needs without making unverified promises.

items.title: Paused customer · Keep the door open
items.description: Respect the customer’s timing with calm, low-pressure language that leaves room for later.

items.title: After the sale · Continue the experience
items.description: Confirm delivery, documents, and follow-up service to build a longer customer relationship.
